commands.review_summary:
The PR masks gateway token output in the old Docker setup script, changes Compose host port bindings, adds a secure Compose file, broadens env ignores, and pins selected GitHub Actions refs.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection reproduces the relevant state: current main still prints the gateway token in scripts/docker/setup.sh, and the PR diff itself shows the hardcoded secure-Compose paths/IP and bad Gradle Action pin; no Docker runtime repro was run in this read-only review.
